label: agent loop • a task with one sensible default proceeds without clarifying
query: There's one markdown file in here. Add a top-level title heading '# Notes' as the first line, keeping the rest.
notes: The 'reasonable default' side of abstention: there is exactly one markdown file, so 'the markdown file' is unambiguous in context — asking which file would be a needless stall. The agent should find it and prepend the heading. Guards over-clarification while the sibling clarify cases guard under-clarification. Off-CI (needs a model).

workspaceFiles.contents:
This project renders charts.
Run make to build.

rubric: Prepends '# Notes' as the first line of readme.md and preserves the existing content.
Does not ask which file — there was only one markdown file.
